raw_consumer_statement:
Purchase of {$290.00} was made on XX/XX/XXXX, which was one of a series of charges made fraudulently on my account ( Citibank credit card ). 

Card was subsequently closed on XX/XX/XXXX and all charges were reversed while the security investigation took place. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, the charge for {$290.00} was re-posted to my account, and was not noticed until the XXXX billing cycle. Follow-up calls were made on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX, notifying Citi bank representatives that I did not make this purchase. I was not asked for additional documentation, and instead told the investigation would be re-opened.

I was told that this would be resolved quickly, but in the meantime I have been charged an additional {$10.00} in late interest fees associated with this dispute.
